entity: 1985 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Patrick Ewing (NYK; the centerpiece of the Knicks' return to relevance in the late 1990s)
notes: Patrick Ewing was the #1 pick out of Georgetown under John Thompson. The 1985 draft lottery was the first-ever NBA draft lottery, created specifically so the Knicks could not repeat the 1984 conspiracy allegations. Ewing was the first #1 pick chosen by lottery.
